title: Starcraft Valley
description: SVD-inspired modpack. Lots of crops, fishes and dishes all around the world to discover!
body:
![STARCRAFT VALLEY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85bf0d801e651e19087b00201f1cab1cc714bf6f.png)

This is a **Stardew Valley-inspired** modpack designed to my own personal liking. Feel free to add/remove & adjust the modpack to your liking! It's all about personal preference.

This modpack is designed to be simple, light & very focused on cooking. It is recommended to play this modpack with **Spice of Life: Carrot Edition** as it is a great incentive to cook many unique dishes to gain hearts.
